threadPoolSize.markdownDescription:
Number of threads to allocate to transform events into TenXObjects concurrently

Controls the number of threads to allocate to transform events into TenXObjects concurrently. If the value is -  | Setting                          | Allocated Threads                                                                                           | |----------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------| | :material-equal: **0**           | Transform events into TenXObjects synchronously using their input stream calling thread                      | | :material-less-than: **1**       | Interpreted as a percentage of the number of available cores (e.g., 0.5 = use up to 50% of available cores) | | :material-equal: **1**           | Allocate a single dedicated to transform events                                                             | | :material-greater-than: **1**    | Interpreted as a fixed number of threads (e.g., 10 = 10 threads)                                            |

batchSize.markdownDescription:
Maximum number of events to queue for concurrent processing before flushing

Sets the number of events to queue before flushing them to transform into TenXObjects. If [threadPoolSize](https://doc.log10x.com/run/transform/parallelize/#paralleleventthreadpoolsize) is 1, this value is unused, and events are transformed into TenXObject synchronously  to their calling input's thread.  If 0, flush pending events after [flushInterval](https://doc.log10x.com/run/transform/parallelize/#paralleleventflushinterval) expires or the source input reaches end-of-file. (Accepts number or string with $= prefix for runtime evaluation) (Default: 1000)

flushInterval.markdownDescription:
Maximum wait duration before flushing queued events

Sets an interval period for (e.g. '2s) before flushing pending events to transform into TenXObjects. If [threadPoolSize](https://doc.log10x.com/run/transform/parallelize/#paralleleventthreadpoolsize) is 1, this value is unused, and events are transformed into TenXObject synchronously  to their input thread. If 0, no wait flush interval is applied. (Default: 2s)

processingTimeout.markdownDescription:
Maximum wait duration before dropping un-processed queued events

Sets a timeout period (e.g., '30s'), after which to drop queued events. This value provides a backstop for overflowing the heap if the pipeline cannot dequeue  pending events to transform into TenXObject. If 0, no timeout is applied. (Default: 30s)
